org.apache.juneau.rest.server.guard

    Method
    Description
    RateLimitGuard.Builder
    RateLimitGuard.Builder.burst(int value)
    Sets the burst capacity (maximum tokens a bucket can hold).
    static RateLimitGuard.Builder
    RateLimitGuard.create()
    Creates a new builder.
    RateLimitGuard.Builder
    RateLimitGuard.Builder.exemptPaths(String... values)
    Sets the set of request paths that bypass throttling.
    RateLimitGuard.Builder
    RateLimitGuard.Builder.keyBy(Function<RestRequest,String> value)
    Sets the per-request key resolver.
    RateLimitGuard.Builder
    RateLimitGuard.Builder.permitsPerHour(int value)
    Sets the steady-state refill rate in permits per hour.
    RateLimitGuard.Builder
    RateLimitGuard.Builder.permitsPerMinute(int value)
    Sets the steady-state refill rate in permits per minute.
    RateLimitGuard.Builder
    RateLimitGuard.Builder.permitsPerSecond(int value)
    Sets the steady-state refill rate in permits per second.
    RateLimitGuard.Builder
    RateLimitGuard.Builder.storage(RateLimitGuard.Storage value)
    Sets the bucket-state storage backend.
    RateLimitGuard.Builder
    RateLimitGuard.Builder.whenLimitExceeded(BiConsumer<RestRequest,RateLimitGuard.RateLimitInfo> value)
    Sets a callback invoked when a request is rejected due to an empty bucket.
    RateLimitGuard.Builder
    RateLimitGuard.Builder.xForwardedForAware(boolean value)
    Enables X-Forwarded-For-aware key resolution.
